text: Standing in this modern gallery, I feel enveloped by the ambient buzz of inquiry and reflection. The sharp lights, curious design, and the R+D emblazoned wall seem to encourage experimentation. Reading the display’s poetic text—"confusion is indeed the rhythm, the world blurs by..."—I sense a resonance, a relief in admitting not knowing, and a calm curiosity in participating, even if just as an observer. Here, meaning seems fluid and emergent, constructed through the act of being present and attentive.
